name: Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Use either 6 large or 10 small Pyrex cups, or a single bread mold in a souffle dish. If using individual cups, divide the batter evenly among them.
2. In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, salt, and 2 tablespoons of sugar.
3. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients and pour in the egg, milk, and melted butter or oil. Mix until combined; do not overmix.
4. Gently fold in the blueberries mixed with 3 tablespoons of sugar.
5. If using individual cups, fill each only halfway. Place half the cups on a trivet at the bottom of the slow cooker. Cover the top layer loosely with a plate to create space for a second layer.
6. Cook on Low for 2½ to 3 hours before breakfast time. For muffins baked in individual cups, halve the recipe and bake until golden brown. Makes about 12 muffins.
